text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I've completed the workout sets. Doing high knees on the
sand is quite exhausting.
choice_data_list: All right. Let's take a ten-minute breather.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Understood.

Biwa Hayahide needs to work on the basics, so we're at summer camp
doing core training on the beach.

We use our perfectly designed training plan to get consistent results.
Everything goes smoothly—that is, until near the end of the day...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... How did I do?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Your time's really improved! And you've steadily been getting faster
since camp started. Let's keep up this pace!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh! Got it! Thank you!

A bright-eyed Umamusume is producing good results nearby.
Hayahide probably can't help but notice her.

While we're doing basic drills, she might get impatient seeing others
making dramatic gains. That's not unusual when first starting to run
races.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Why wouldn't I be? Of course I'm fine. All right, ten minutes are
up—let's get back to training.

With nothing else to say about it, we stick to the plan and continue
her training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There, we're done for today. All finished and according to schedule.
Perfect.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Let's go back to the camp dorms.

Just as I feel like my worries are unfounded when I see her so calm,
she looks over at me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh yes, I was wondering... What are your plans for the evening?
choice_data_list:
Gulp. Don't tell me you want to add even more
training to the schedule...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hah... You must think I'm a glutton for punishment. You wouldn't be
wrong though.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I'm simply asking what your plans tonight are. If you're free,
there's somewhere I'd like to take you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I feel like we haven't had a single conversation since camp
started, other than to talk about training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's a little soon, but I want to reflect on our progress. No... That's not
right. I should state my intentions clearly.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What I mean to say is... I want to go to the festival with you.
Tap, tap, tap... Crack!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Game Operator
text_block_list.text:
Oh, almost had it! But you split the fish tail into pieces. Too bad!
Better luck next time!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Rats... Another failure. Theoretically, I should be able to cut an
impeccable shape if I take the weakness of the grooves into
account...
Hayahide has brought me to a summer festival near camp.

Having enjoyed a stroll around the attractions, we're now trying our
hand at the candy-cutting game.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I sharpened the toothpick. I've also made preparations to counter
particulate accumulation. Everything was perfect... But why? Did I
miscalculate the applied force?
choice_data_list: I think you're leaning your shoulder in too hard.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes... It appears so. My calculations were accurate, but putting them
into effect made me flustered, thus leading to a bad outcome.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So, however flawless the formula, if I can't match it with my abilities,
it's no more than a useless string of random numbers.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If an individual has innate talent and dedication... My sister, for
example—she'd be able to prove the formula without difficulty.

Saying this, her eyes wander upwards to the sea of stars shimmering in
the night sky.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Brian won't choose another path. However hard it is, she'll
train those amazing legs she was born with... and go to the top.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But it's different for me. I have to calculate the shortest route, remove
obstacles, and adjust my running just to make it to the starting line.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And yet... it's fine that way. That's simply who I am.

I see no resignation in her smile—only the radiance of someone who
confronted and accepted herself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was nothing special before—always scrambling to gain a footing. But
I found my talent, developed it, and became the person I am now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And you accepted me for exactly who I am.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's why it's fine. Even if I don't get there as fast as I'd like, I'll
move boldly forward and trust in my ability. That's my path.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In other words, I wanted to say there's no need to worry. Every day I'm
growing in both mind and body.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's all. And now, to use a strategy certain to obliterate this
candy-cutting game. I can already see victory!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'll get it this time!
After a few more attempts...
Tap, tap, tap... Snap!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I did it! Look, I cut it out beautifully!

text_block_list.name: Game Operator
text_block_list.text:
That's mighty impressive! This is the best cut I've ever seen! You
showed real tenacity! What a win!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, indeed. I make an art out of persevering until I've reached the
perfect solution.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer? Heheh.

The festive night becomes a wonderful memory. And with our minds
and bodies refreshed, the final day of summer camp arrives.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hup... Haaah!

As I check Biwa Hayahide's time to see how she's improved, I can
barely recognize her running...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How was it? That should be my maximum output. Did we reach our
goal?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Going through the fundamentals led to success. This method really
does suit me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
An equation for growth that leads to victory... And I discovered it
with you.

She looks out over the expansive horizon. But no matter how far she
sets her aim, I know she'll reach it.
And together—we will complete the winning equation!
